title: Workspace Wednesday
excerpt: This should probably be titled, "Workspace Saturday" as this was what my table looked like at a pre-Oscars event at the Peninsula Hotel last weekend. If you're old like me, you may recognize Kathleen Robertson from her days on 90210.…
body: This should probably be titled, "Workspace Saturday" as this was what my table looked like at a pre-Oscars event at the Peninsula Hotel last weekend. If you're old like me, you may recognize Kathleen Robertson from her days on 90210. More recently, I loved her character on Boss.
